title: Remote Detonators
description: Adds Remote Detonators Which Can Detonate TNT or redstone Things Remotely
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c3408d57368499b3f1e29c3c075a63c6fa862f1.png)
### Available for:
[![Neoforge label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a836f7c51f2b8c91b76be4cb8d5b24a4c859dc6a.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-detonators/versions?l=neoforge)
[![Forge label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ef1252edfb54ffd2494d670db81801ae9c7a2f.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-detonators/versions?l=forge)
[![Fabric label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f88d61d699dbf81e53ab0f32d003405363375958_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-detonators/versions?l=fabric)

This mod adds remote detonators which can be used to detonate TNT or power redstone powered things.                                                                                                                   
The Detonators have 8 different colors, black (default color), brown, red, purple, lime, pink, yellow and green.                                                                                          
you can wash off the paint by right clicking cauldron filled with water while holding colored detonator in your hand
## Features
### Customizable Text
Customizable via config mod like [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
- Selected block text
- Triggered text

![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/565ad368e5661ee365cd36918bd30d8f0711e9ac_0.webp)

### Simulate Right Click
Can be turned on via config mod like [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
- Right clicks the target block when triggered

### Redstone dust mode
**WARNING!** It's really buggy                                                                  

Can be turned on via config mod like [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
- Instead of placing redstone block under the block for 1 tick it will activate redstone dust for 1s.                                                                                                        
- Powers everything that is connected to the redstone dust.

![Redstone dust connected to tnt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a4196bfd6dea25abc54a59fc1248e0642c859a.png)

![MCreator Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c7664107a184c7b5bd17433f4094f2d60194541.png)

*Remember that the mod is in Beta and everything is subject to change*  

This mod was made using MCreator,                                                                                 
but will not get updated regulary because i'm the only person working on it.

<details>
<summary>Q&A</summary>

**Can you port the mod to 1.19.4 or lower?**

I already tried but it kept crashing.

**Can you add animations to the detonators?**

I already experimented with that but it would take too much effort and because i had to disable arm animations it looked bad, closest thing i can do is add compatability for hold my items mod.

**Am i allowed to use this mod in my Modpack?**

Yes, you can use it in your Modpack

if you have more questions then join the discord server and i will answer it

</details>

## Credits
Fabric versions were only possible because of a fabric generator on MCreator made by Goldorion
